threatgraph_indicators.description: An ASEP registry key was modified for a generic accessibility assistive technologies (ATs) provider. Adversaries often use this to bypass Windows login security. Review the process tree and registry key.
An executable with two file name extensions was written. Adversaries can masquerade malware with a seemingly safe file extension to evade detection. Review the executable.
A process accessed system network configuration settings. Adversaries can use this for lateral movement efforts. Review the process tree.
A process gathered information about the operating system or hardware. Adversaries can use this to identify system vulnerabilities. Review the process tree.

description: An executable with two file name extensions was written. Adversaries can masquerade malware with a seemingly safe file extension to evade detection. Review the executable.
name: DoubleExtensionWritten

description: A process gathered information about the operating system or hardware. Adversaries can use this to identify system vulnerabilities. Review the process tree.
name: GenericSystemInfoDiscovery

description: A process accessed system network configuration settings. Adversaries can use this for lateral movement efforts. Review the process tree.
name: GenericSystemNetworkConfigDiscovery

description: An ASEP registry key was modified for a generic accessibility assistive technologies (ATs) provider. Adversaries often use this to bypass Windows login security. Review the process tree and registry key.
name: AccessibilityApiGenericAsepModified

threatgraph_indicators.description: A process appears to be using a Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) application in a suspicious manner. This may be an attempt to gather information, gain access, or drop other malicious payloads. Investigate the process tree and the detected process.
A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.
A process has accessed the Chrome SQL Login Data database and loaded a decryption module. This may be an attempt to steal Chrome passwords. Review the process tree.

description: A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.
name: GenericPowershellExecution

threatgraph_indicators.description: This process created an injected thread in another process, a common Process Migration technique. Review the process tree.
A process appears to have performed a system call by bypassing UMPPC hooks.
A process appears to have performed a system call by bypassing UMPPC hooks.

description: A process appears to have performed a system call by bypassing UMPPC hooks.
name: UmppcBypassSuspected
